ValidationRule.description: User only able to create account within his/her country/region/zone
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT( $Profile.Name = 'System Administrator' || CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'Head Office') || CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'HO Operations Manager') ),
OR(
($User.Country = 'India' && UPPER(BillingCountry) <> UPPER($User.Country)),
(CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'Zonal Sales 1') && ( UPPER(BillingCountry) <> 'MALAYSIA' && UPPER(BillingCountry) <> 'SINGAPORE' && UPPER(BillingCountry) <> 'BRUNEI DARUSSALAM' ) ),
(CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'Zonal Sales 2') && ( UPPER(BillingCountry) <> 'INDONESIA' && UPPER(BillingCountry) <> 'PHILIPPINES' ) ),
(CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'Zonal Sales 3') && ( UPPER(BillingCountry) <> 'THAILAND' && UPPER(BillingCountry) <> 'VIETNAM' ) ),
( ISPICKVAL($User.Region__c, 'ANZ') && NOT(CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'ANZ Regional Sales')) && NOT(CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'ANZ Back Office Operations Manager')) && ( (UPPER($User.Country) = 'AUSTRALIA' && UPPER(BillingCountry) <> 'AUSTRALIA') || (UPPER($User.Country) = 'NEW ZEALAND' && UPPER(BillingCountry) <> 'NEW ZEALAND') ) ),
( (CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'ANZ Regional Sales') || CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'ANZ Back Office Operations Manager')) && ( UPPER(BillingCountry) <> 'AUSTRALIA' && UPPER(BillingCountry) <> 'NEW ZEALAND' ) ),
( NOT( CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'Zonal Sales') || CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'Regional Sales') || CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'Back Office') ) && UPPER(BillingCountry) <> UPPER($User.Country) && NOT( CONTAINS(UPPER(BillingCountry), 'BRUNEI') ||
( $User.Username = 'vince.xie@gc.dental' && ( CONTAINS(UPPER(BillingCountry), 'AFGHANISTAN') || CONTAINS(UPPER(BillingCountry), 'CAMBODIA') || CONTAINS(UPPER(BillingCountry), 'LAO') || CONTAINS(UPPER(BillingCountry), 'MYANMAR') || CONTAINS(UPPER(BillingCountry), 'PAKISTAN') ) )
) ),
( UPPER(BillingCountry) = 'BRUNEI DARUSSALAM' && UPPER($User.Country) <> 'BRUNEI DARUSSALAM' && NOT($Permission.Manage_Brunei) )
) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can only create an Account within the Country or Region/Zone you are assigned to. Please check the billing country that you populated.
